## Appendix

### Glossary

| Term | Definition |
|------|-----------|
| **ROAS** | Return on Ad Spend (Revenue / Investment) |
| **CPA** | Cost per Acquisition (Investment / Conversions) |
| **CTR** | Click-Through Rate (Clicks / Impressions) |
| **Conv. Rate** | Conversion Rate (Conversions / Clicks) |
| **CPC** | Cost per Click (Investment / Clicks) |
| **CPM** | Cost per Mille (Cost per 1,000 Impressions) |
